title: The Waystation

location.name: Roadside Waystation
location.description: A low stone building at a crossroads, lit by a single lantern. Rain on the roof.

art.subject: stone waystation at a rainy crossroads, night, single lantern

narration: The rain has followed you for three days, and the waystation is the first roof you've seen. Inside, warmth. A keeper behind the counter watches you shake the water off — not unkindly, but carefully, the way people watch strangers who arrive after dark.

entities.name: Ash
entities.description: The waystation keeper. Grey-braided, steady hands, a ledger always open.

art.subject: middle-aged waystation keeper with grey braids, lantern light

entities.name: Sealed Letter
entities.description: A letter on the counter, addressed to no one, sealed in black wax.

dialogue.text: Room's a copper, meal's another. The letter — that's been waiting longer than you've been walking.

transition.hint: The player claimed the mysterious letter without asking questions. Ash reacts; the letter's weight suggests something inside besides paper.

choices.label: Ask Ash who left the letter.

transition.hint: The player is cautious and curious — probes for information before acting. Ash shares what little she knows; deepen the mystery without resolving it.

choices.label: Pay for a room and ignore the letter.

transition.hint: The player avoids the hook — respect that. A quiet night scene, but the world doesn't forget the letter; let consequence arrive on its own time.
